nasb.text: And they brought in the ark of God and placed it inside the tent which David had pitched for it, and they offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before God.

esv.text: And they brought in the ark of God and set it inside the tent that David had pitched for it, and they offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before God.

cnv.text: 他們把　神的約櫃抬了進去，安放在大衛為它所搭的會幕中間，然後在　神面前獻上了燔祭和平安祭。

ccb.text: 众人将上帝的约柜抬进去，安放在大卫所搭的帐篷里，然后在上帝面前献上燔祭和平安祭。
